channel.title: Oracle Insights — Singularity Convergence
channel.description: The Oracle speaks on the questions you're really asking. Bible parables, hidden lessons, and the truth most churches skip.

item.title: What Does the Bible Say About Anger?
item.description: Most people think the Bible says anger is a sin. It doesn't. The Oracle reveals what Scripture actually teaches about anger — and the hidden lesson in Ephesians 4 that changes everything.

item.title: How to Find Purpose in Life
item.description: You thought success would feel different. The Bible reveals a hidden truth about purpose that most people never discover — and it's not about your career.

item.title: What Does the Bible Say About Forgiveness?
item.description: Most people think forgiveness means pretending it didn't hurt. The Bible says something radically different. The Oracle reveals the hidden lesson in Matthew 18 that changes everything.

item.title: Why Does God Allow Suffering?
item.description: If God is good, why is there so much pain? The Oracle reveals what the Bible actually says about suffering — and the hidden lesson in the Book of Job that most people completely miss.

item.title: Can You Be Spiritual Without Church?
item.description: You left the building but you didn't leave God. The Oracle on what the Bible actually says about church — and why community matters even when institutions fail.

item.title: What Does the Bible Say About Hell?
item.description: The word "hell" isn't in the original Bible. Here's what's actually there.

item.title: Is It a Sin to Doubt God?
item.description: Thomas doubted Jesus to his face. Jesus didn't condemn him — he invited him closer.

item.title: What Does the Bible Say About Anxiety?
item.description: Churches say "pray harder." The Bible says something completely different. The Oracle breaks down Philippians 4:6 and reveals the hidden lesson about anxiety that most people never hear from a pulpit.
